description: Final Wave retry fixes for lab-explicit-textbook-experiments-restore

fixes.finding: Malformed title '的观察与描述' in exp-iron-rusting and lab-experiment-rj-chemistry-grade9-2024-vol1-0010-source-section-l89-l113-dfed8417
fixes.rootCause: cleanTitlePhrase stripped '实验现象' prefix from '实验现象的观察与描述' using /^实验(?:内容|现象|记录)?[：:]?\s*/u, leaving the malformed fragment '的观察与描述'
changes: Added '的观察与描述' to genericTitleKeys in both builder and validator
Added /^[的与及和或之][\p{Script=Han}]/u rejection in isMeaningfulTitle for both builder and validator
Fixed cleanTitlePhrase to only strip '实验现象' when it is a standalone prefix (followed by punctuation/space/end), not when part of possessive phrase like '实验现象的观察与描述'
Strengthened matchLegacyExperimentId to require heading-level signals (title+description) rather than full haystack, preventing false matches on generic sections that merely mention legacy topics

fixes.finding: Playwright placeholder text rejection failed because .element-cell not found during waitForAppReady
fixes.rootCause: waitForAppReady waited for .element-cell which is only present on the periodic-table route; navigating directly to /#/lab meant the element never appeared
changes: Kept nav-home visibility and appState.elements + loaderHidden poll as the readiness signal

fixes.finding: Running lab + reaction game suites together caused failures
fixes.rootCause: Cross-test localStorage pollution: lab tests seed fixture data and reaction game tests read/write gameScores; running in same worker state leaked between suites
changes: Added window.localStorage.clear() in reaction-game-completion.spec.ts openReactionGame helper

fixes.rootCause: No favicon asset or link tag present in index.html
changes: Added <link rel='icon' type='image/svg+xml' href='/favicon.svg'> to index.html <head>
